requirement_topic.en: Lithium battery transport: UN 38.3, dangerous-goods papers and Myanmar routing
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输：UN 38.3、危险品文件及缅甸路径
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸：UN 38.3、危險品文件及緬甸路徑

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks shipped to Myanmar should retain UN 38.3 test summaries, dangerous-goods classification, SDS, packing instructions, marks, labels, and carrier acceptance records. Shipments may enter through Yangon/Thilawa seaport or overland via Mandalay from Yunnan; route selection affects customs paperwork, carrier restrictions, and transit documents. Transport documentation is separate from MSTRD product conformity and from MIC or MEPE project approvals.
summary.zh: 出口至缅甸的锂电池和移动电源应保留UN 38.3测试概要、危险品分类、SDS、包装指令、标记、标签及承运人接受记录。货物可经仰光/迪拉瓦港进入，也可从云南陆运至曼德勒；路径选择会影响海关文件、承运人限制及中转文件。运输文件独立于MSTRD产品合格评定，也独立于MIC或MEPE项目批准。
summary.zht: 出口至緬甸的鋰電池和行動電源應保留UN 38.3測試概要、危險品分類、SDS、包裝指令、標記、標籤及承運人接受記錄。貨物可經仰光/迪拉瓦港進入，也可從雲南陸運至曼德勒；路徑選擇會影響海關文件、承運人限制及中轉文件。運輸文件獨立於MSTRD產品合格評定，也獨立於MIC或MEPE項目批准。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
Dangerous-goods transport rules applicable to the chosen sea, air, or road carrier
Myanmar customs documentation for Yangon/Thilawa or Mandalay import routes

summary.en: China export practice commonly includes UN 38.3 test summaries, MSDS/SDS, dangerous-goods declarations, battery marks, packing evidence, and China customs export documents. These are necessary transport inputs but do not replace Myanmar customs import filing or carrier acceptance on the selected route.
summary.zh: 中国出口实践通常包括UN 38.3测试概要、MSDS/SDS、危险品申报、电池标记、包装证据及中国海关出口文件。这些是必要的运输输入，但不能替代缅甸海关进口申报或所选路径承运人的接受确认。
summary.zht: 中國出口實踐通常包括UN 38.3測試概要、MSDS/SDS、危險品申報、電池標記、包裝證據及中國海關出口文件。這些是必要的運輸輸入，但不能替代緬甸海關進口申報或所選路徑承運人的接受確認。

gap.en: The gap is not the existence of UN 38.3, which is common internationally, but route execution. Exporters need a Myanmar route file that matches sea or overland movement, local customs entry, and carrier restrictions for standalone batteries, batteries packed with equipment, or batteries contained in equipment.
gap.zh: 差距不在于UN 38.3本身，因为其为国际通用要求；差距在于路径执行。出口商需要与海运或陆运、本地海关入境、承运人对单独电池、随设备包装电池或设备内置电池限制相匹配的缅甸路径文件。
gap.zht: 差距不在於UN 38.3本身，因為其為國際通用要求；差距在於路徑執行。出口商需要與海運或陸運、本地海關入境、承運人對單獨電池、隨設備包裝電池或設備內置電池限制相匹配的緬甸路徑文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery transport acceptance and customs clearance in practice, subject to carrier, mode, and route.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice for China lithium battery exports and carrier acceptance.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods files route-specific for Myanmar. Yangon/Thilawa sea entry and Mandalay overland entry from Yunnan can require different carrier and customs evidence even when the underlying battery test file is the same.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸UN 38.3和危险品文件应按路径管理。仰光/迪拉瓦海运入境与云南至曼德勒陆运入境，即使底层电池测试文件相同，也可能需要不同的承运人和海关证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸UN 38.3和危險品文件應按路徑管理。仰光/迪拉瓦海運入境與雲南至曼德勒陸運入境，即使底層電池測試文件相同，也可能需要不同的承運人和海關證據。
